title: vicia angustifolia subsp. uncinata
intro: Vicia angustifolia subsp. uncinata is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae, commonly known as narrowleaf vetch. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Vicia angustifolia subsp. uncinata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
